text:
Oleg Bulyzhin wrote:


> Could you please test attached patch? It is not completely correct
> (right way is converting p->numbytes to int64_t, but this would lead
> to ABI breakage and is not applicable to RELENG_6), but should cure your
> crashes and hangs.

I have tested this patch. It has solved all my problems with dummmynet.
Thank you very much!
